title: Mary Had a Little Lamb — vocal takes

samples.name: line-1
samples.desc: mary had a little lamb — 100 bpm, 4/4. The melody steps down then back up: 'ma-ry had a' falls, 'lit-tle lamb' sits on the same note, hold 'lamb' for 2 beats.

samples.name: line-2
samples.desc: little lamb, little lamb — same tempo. First 'little lamb' stays low (hold 'lamb' 2 beats), second 'little lamb' jumps up to the high note ('lamb' is the top of the tune, held 2 beats).

samples.name: line-3
samples.desc: mary had a little lamb — same tempo, identical to line 1. Steps down on 'ma-ry had a', back up for 'lit-tle lamb', hold 'lamb' 2 beats.

samples.name: line-4
samples.desc: its fleece was white as snow — same tempo, the resolution. 'was' lifts up a step then the line settles down to the tonic on 'snow', held for 3 beats.
samples.lyric: its fleece was white as snow_
